name: balloon_service
description: Install, verify, and uninstall the virtio-balloon Windows service (blnsvr.exe)

test_steps.desc: Verify Balloon PnP device is present and working
test_steps.guest_run: $d = Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.HardwareID -match 'VEN_1AF4&DEV_1002|VEN_1AF4&DEV_1045' }; if (-not $d) { throw 'Balloon PnP device (VEN_1AF4 DEV_1002/1045) not found in device list' }; Write-Output "Balloon device: $($d.FriendlyName) [$($d.Status)]"; if ($d.Status -eq 'Error') { throw 'Balloon device found but in Error state: ' + $d.ConfigManagerErrorCode }

$blnsvr = Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\AutoHCK\balloon_pkg -Filter blnsvr.exe | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $blnsvr) { throw 'blnsvr.exe not found in driver package - check driver path' }; Write-Output "Found: $($blnsvr.FullName)"; & $blnsvr.FullName -i; Write-Output 'Balloon service install command executed'

test_steps.desc: Verify balloon service is registered and running
test_steps.guest_run: $svc = Get-Service -Name 'BalloonService' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $svc) { throw 'BalloonService not found - install may have failed' }; Write-Output "Service: $($svc.Name) - Status: $($svc.Status)"; if ($svc.Status -ne 'Running') { Start-Service BalloonService }; $svc = Get-Service BalloonService; Write-Output "PASS: BalloonService is $($svc.Status)"
Stop-Service BalloonService -Force; $svc = Get-Service BalloonService; Write-Output "Service stopped: $($svc.Status)"
$blnsvr = Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\AutoHCK\balloon_pkg -Filter blnsvr.exe | Select-Object -First 1; & $blnsvr.FullName -u; Write-Output 'PASS: Balloon service uninstalled'

test_steps.desc: Confirm service is no longer registered
test_steps.guest_run: $svc = Get-Service -Name 'BalloonService' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($svc) { throw 'BalloonService still registered after uninstall' }; Write-Output 'PASS: BalloonService removed successfully'

cleanup.desc: Force uninstall balloon service if still present
cleanup.guest_run: if (Test-Path C:\AutoHCK\balloon_pkg) { $blnsvr = Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\AutoHCK\balloon_pkg -Filter blnsvr.exe | Select-Object -First 1; if ($blnsvr) { & $blnsvr.FullName -u } }
